title: ModMakerDude's Helpful Potions
body:
# New Potions:
**Lumber Jack - Gives you the wood from a tree when you look at the base when active.**

**Water Bubble - Makes a bubble of air around you when you are in the water while active.**

**Lava Bubble - Like Water Bubble but with lava and it more clears lava.**
## Recipes
**Lumber Jack - Awkward potion and wood planks.**

**Lumber Jack Long - Lumber Jack potion and logs.**

**Water Bubble - Water Bucket and Awkward potion.**

**Water Bubble Long - Water Bucket and Water Bubble potion.**

**Lava Bubble - Awkward potion and Lava Bucket.**

**Lava Bubble Long - Lava Bubble potion and Magma Block.**
